prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial is in black and white and appears somewhat low-resolution.

At the beginning, the frame shows a close-up of a reflective, oval or spoon-like surface against a plain background. Inside the reflection is the face of a person, possibly a woman, though the image is distorted and unclear. No surrounding setting is visible.

Later, the commercial cuts to a close-up of a cup filled with a dark liquid, likely coffee, sitting on a saucer. A spoon held above the cup contains a mound of light-colored powder or granules, positioned as if it is about to be added to the drink.

At the end, the commercial shows a product display. A jar labeled “Pream” stands on the left. Large superimposed text reads: “THE CREAMIEST TASTING PREAM EVER.” A “Good Housekeeping” seal is also shown near the bottom. In the background and to the right are serving items and small round objects that may be coffee beans or decorative food items, though the details are not fully clear.
